title: Launch Planning Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger launch planning foundations judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Launch Planning Foundations is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Launch Planning Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good launch planning foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Launch Planning Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
